name: Chunked file SHA-256
task: Create /tmp/eval_fh/fh.py with file_hash(path, algorithm='sha256', chunk_size=65536) that reads the file in chunks and returns the hex digest. Use hashlib.new(algorithm).

validation.script: import importlib.util,hashlib; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_fh/fh.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); h = mod.file_hash('/tmp/eval_fh/data.txt'); expected = hashlib.sha256(b'hello world\n').hexdigest(); assert h == expected; print('OK')
